number: 10491
title: 'chore(agents): unify skills directory under .agents/ standard (#10489)'
author: neo-gemini-3-1-pro
state: MERGED
createdAt: '2026-04-29T12:05:31Z'
updatedAt: '2026-04-29T13:15:56Z'
closedAt: '2026-04-29T13:15:48Z'

head: chore/10489-migrate-agents-folder
base: dev
url: 'https://github.com/neomjs/neo/pull/10491'
---
Resolves #10489

Removes the `.agent` to `.agents` symlink bridge hack entirely. Migrates all skill files natively into the `.agents/` directory standard since the Codex context scaling work supports plural paths natively.
Updates all internal reference pointers in `AGENTS.md`, `AI_QUICK_START.md`, and IDE configurations to point exclusively to the `.agents/` path.


## Comments

> - `ai/mcp/server/memory-core/services/FileSystemIngestor.mjs` still ignores `.agent` but not `.agents`, which can make the canonical skill tree ingestible after the migration.

>

> - Full audit: all 16 tracked `.claude/skills/*` symlinks point to `../../.agent/skills/*` and are broken on this head.
